codeReview.summary: The reviewed change does what the feature asked on the production-classpath boundary: commit `0a13d882cdf450486414a25ac1faa787b777f928` deletes `erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/core/config/BbpSampleDataInitializer.java`, relocates `DataInitializer`, `MockDataInitializer`, `ValidationSeedDataInitializer`, `CriticalFixtureInitializer`, and `CriticalFixtureService` into `src/test/java`, and leaves no `*DataInitializer*` or `CriticalFixture*` classes under `erp-domain/src/main/java`. The current test suite now explicitly asserts the relocated seed classes load from the test classpath in `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/core/config/DataInitializerTest.java:67`, `.../MockDataInitializerTest.java:75`, `.../ValidationSeedDataInitializerTest.java:124`, `.../BenchmarkDataInitializerTest.java:59`, and `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/core/service/CriticalFixtureServiceTest.java:87`. I did not find any remaining production-source references to the moved classes or a regression in the feature’s contract from the landed diff and current tree.

summary: PASS. The feature removes the remaining seed/bootstrap classes from `src/main`, deletes the overlapping BBP sample initializer, and adds test-classpath guards for the moved seeders without leaving production references behind.
